_comment: Species: Ant Beast (蚁兽) from Renegade Immortal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Ant Beast

canonical.appearance: Giant ant 1 m long (worker) to 3 m (soldier), mandibles can sever spirit-steel, queens 8 m
canonical.behavior: Eusocial; builds underground kingdoms millions strong; cultivates communally
canonical.habitat: Underground spirit mines, ant kingdom biomes, earth-aspected deep caves
canonical.cultivation: Foundation Establishment (worker) -> Core Formation (soldier) -> Nascent Soul (queen)
canonical.relationships: Enemy of underground civilizations; rival of giant centipedes
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: ant_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
